pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Serverless API (Lambda) implements security group rules and access controls. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Infrastructure as Code ensures consistent, repeatable deployments of Serverless API (Lambda).

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Production configuration balances performance requirements with cost efficiency through right-sized resources.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Configurable instance types and resource parameters allow tuning Serverless API (Lambda) for specific workload characteristics.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.
